headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -62.5)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 93% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 162 quotes and an overwhelming 137 at strong intensity, meaning people are venting with unusual force today.
• At 88.7, frustrations are near the upper end of their 154-day range (max 165.7), making this one of the more intense days on record.
• Fears dropped sharply from yesterday (-13.8 to -30.4), signalling quieter-than-usual anxiety, while optimism also slipped into negative territory.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
